info.english_meaning: to decay to get killed to get destroyed to wane to go away to reduce to shrink
info.hindI_arTa: nazwa honA sUkzma honA hrAsa honA kama honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ( antarBAvitaRyarTastu sakarmakaH ) ' kzaye kzayati hiMsAyAM kziRAtIti zito Bavet  nivAsagatyoH kziyati kziRotyAvaguRe kziRoH' (Slo.12.13) iti devaH   " O - uvikaraRe aguRe guRABAve ca sati ' kzaRu hiMsAyAM kzaRu ca ' iti mEtreyarakzitAdyuktasya DAtoH kziRotIti Bavati " iti puruzakAre lIlASukamuniH  antarBAvitaRyarTopi ayam - ' na kzIyate iti akzaram ' iti BAzye darSanAt  taTA sati sakarmakatvamapi

upasargachandrika.example_text: loke prAyeRAkarmako'yam vede tu sakarmako dfzwaH sakarmakatve divAdirna
'upalaprakziRI nanA' (f॰9.112.3) upalena pezaRakarItyarTaH prakzIRamidaM devadattasya iha devadattaScikzAya ayaM devadattakzayasya pradeSa ityarTaH
'paSUntsaNkziRAti' (aTarva॰3.28.2) ezA vijAtA yaminI paSUnAM hAnaye kalpata ityAha
'nU no rAsva… dyumadagne suvIryaM varzizWamanupakzitam' (f0 3137) anupakzitaM vyaye kriyamARe'pyanupakzIRam akzayyamityarTaH
